nasb.text: The spies saw a man coming out of the city and they said to him, “Please show us the entrance to the city and we will treat you kindly.”

esv.text: And the spies saw a man coming out of the city, and they said to him, “Please show us the way into the city, and we will deal kindly with you.”

cnv.text: 窺探的人看見一個人從城裡出來，就對他說：“請你把進城的路指示我們，我們必恩待你。”

ccb.text: 探子看见一个人从城里出来，就对他说：“请你告诉我们进城的路，我们必善待你。”
